definition: ALM-driven pension fund and insurance duration demand concentrates at 20y–30y maturities, creating a structural bid for long bonds while the 7y–10y sector bears the brunt of coupon supply concentration, contributing to persistent belly cheapness in butterfly spreads.
evidence: ALM-driven demand concentrates at specific duration targets as funded status improves
7y–10y sector bears the brunt of coupon supply concentration
open_questions: How to isolate demographic effect from liquidity premium and dealer hedging effects
